final_prompt.prompt:
Create a short-form vertical video cover for an esports monitor launch campaign (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a "极简高级感" aesthetic — references in the spirit of MUJI brand identity heritage, Swiss International Typographic Style, Dieter Rams' design philosophy; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be rule-of-thirds layout
Subject: must include the esports monitor as the focal product
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: 
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "8k GGU 电竞显示器 1000hz" (large headline, eye-catching), "全球首发全新面板 低延迟 完美色彩" (supporting copy)
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default; must have large prominent headline that grabs attention
Avoid:
